summary: Completed frontend testing of sidebar menu fixes. All tested features are working correctly: floating menu button visible on ALL pages, sidebar navigation links go to correct routes, menu button doesn't overlap with page add buttons, back/home quick action buttons work properly.

minor.priority: LOW - pre-existing issue, not related to sidebar fix
LOW - pre-existing issue, not related to sidebar fix

critical_code_review_comments: Console warnings: 'Unexpected text node: . A text node cannot be a child of a <View>' - appears on several pages, minor cosmetic issue
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sidebar menu fix fully tested and working. Floating menu button (testID='floating-menu-btn') visible on all pages after login. All 18 menu items displayed for admin user. Navigation routes correctly: إدارة الأقسام -> /add-department, لوحة الإدارة -> /(tabs)/admin, الإعدادات العامة -> /general-settings, الأدوار والصلاحيات -> /manage-roles, إدارة المقررات -> /add-course, لوحة تحكم الأقسام -> /department-dashboard. Back (رجوع) and Home (الرئيسية) quick action buttons work correctly. Menu button positioned at top-left (x:8, y:8) with z-index 9999, does not overlap with page add buttons.

tests_performed.test: Floating menu button visible on home page (/(tabs))
tests_performed.notes: Button visible at position {x: 8, y: 8, width: 36, height: 36}

tests_performed.test: Sidebar opens when clicking floating menu button
tests_performed.notes: Modal sidebar slides in from right

tests_performed.test: Sidebar shows ALL 18 menu items for admin
tests_performed.notes: All items found: الرئيسية, لوحة الإدارة, الجدول الدراسي, إدارة الطلاب, إدارة المعلمين, إدارة المقررات, إدارة الأقسام, لوحة تحكم الأقسام, إدارة المستخدمين, التقارير, جميع التقارير, تقرير الحضور, تقرير الطالب, الإنذارات, إدارة الإشعارات, الإعدادات العامة, الأدوار والصلاحيات, سجلات النشاط

Home button (الرئيسية) in sidebar navigates to home

tests_performed.notes: Menu button at {x:8, y:8}, Add button at {x:906, y:100} - no overlap

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All sidebar menu features tested successfully. The fixes implemented by main agent are working correctly.
